data.content: Added UI acceptance tests covering all 5 acceptance criteria. Source-code verification test (header-actions-refine-scope.test.ts) proves HeaderActions wires isPending from Zustand store to button disabled prop, Refinement pending label, and spinner animation. Integration test (scope-refinement-pending-integration.test.ts) proves filterNewCompletions + markComplete round-trip clears pending state and that the hook source calls markComplete for each completed beatId. All quality gates pass: lint clean, tsc clean, 2331 tests pass, build succeeds. Commit 5b766f790c86 on branch worktree-aae0-refine-scope-pending.
